industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Triad Pro Innovators, Inc.
summary: Triad Pro Innovators, Inc. operates as a renewable energy producer and storage provider. It owns and operates combined heat and power renewable energy facilities in California and the Western United States. The company is also involved in the purchase and sale of power generation equipment, as well as in the operation, repair, and maintenance of power generation equipment for other energy facility owners. In addition, it offers energy storage solutions for residential, small business, industrial, and utility applications. The company was formerly known as Shing-Mei International, Inc. and changed its name to Triad Pro Innovators, Inc. in January 2012. Triad Pro Innovators, Inc. was founded in 1994 and is based in La Quinta, California.
